basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR-NIO. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc Marine Science, MSc Oceanography, MSc Physical Oceanography, MSc Space Science and Technology
qualification.details: MSc Marine Science MSc Oceanography MSc Physical Oceanography MSc Space Science and Technology

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I recruitment is 07-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - I post at CSIR-NIO.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc in Marine Science, Oceanography, Physical Oceanography, or Space Science and Technology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is CSIR-NIO located?
faq.answer: CSIR-NIO is located in Goa.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is SSP003765/3193-26.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
